nasb.text: It is burned with fire, it is cut down; They perish at the rebuke of Your countenance.

esv.text: They have burned it with fire; they have cut it down; may they perish at the rebuke of your face!

cnv.text: 這樹已被火燒，被砍下； 他們因你臉上的怒容滅亡。

ccb.text: 这树被砍倒，被焚烧， 愿你发怒毁灭仇敌。

csbs.text: 这葡萄树在烈火中被烧了，被砍掉了， 因你脸上的怒容就要灭亡。
